properties.name: Downtown Cleveland Improvement District
properties.area: Generalized Downtown Cleveland SID envelope from OSM Downtown Cleveland neighbourhood polygon (OSM/Nominatim polygon for 'Downtown Cleveland, Cleveland, Ohio, United States')

properties.name: Ohio City Improvement District
properties.area: Generalized Ohio City neighbourhood envelope approximating the Ohio City Special Improvement District (OSM/Nominatim polygon for 'Ohio City, Cleveland, Ohio, United States')

properties.name: University Circle Special Improvement District
properties.area: Generalized University Circle envelope for the SID adopted by Cleveland City Council (OSM/Nominatim bounding envelope for 'University Circle, Cleveland, Ohio')
